## Summary
- What changed?
- Why now?

## Type of change
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Chore

## Validation
- [ ] Backend tests run
- [ ] Frontend build/test run
- [ ] Manual smoke test done

## Checklist
- [ ] No secrets/tokens added
- [ ] No backup/temp files committed
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Rollback path identified

## Risk / Rollback
- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Rollback: commit hash or steps
